landing.announcement: Latest News: New livestock vaccination tracking now live in version 2.4.

hero.title: Empowering Botswana's
hero.subtitle: Livestock Farmers.
hero.description: Comprehensive herd management and veterinary telehealth, designed to work anywhere—even offline in the remotest areas.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Farm?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of farmers already using Farm-Aid to improve productivity and animal health.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for the realities of rural farming

feature1.title: Offline-First
feature1.desc: Manage your herd records without an internet connection. Sync automatically when you're back in range. Perfect for remote grazing lands.

feature2.title: Smart Diagnostics
feature2.desc: On-device AI to identify livestock diseases from symptoms or photos. Get immediate guidance when time is of the essence.

feature3.title: Telehealth Portal
feature3.desc: Connect with expert veterinarians for remote consultations. Share digital health records for more accurate and faster remote support.

field.title: Designed for the Field.
field.desc: From the Okavango Delta to the Kalahari, Farm-Aid is built to withstand the realities of rural farming. Rugged UI, low battery consumption, and critical alert systems.

footer.description: Building the digital infrastructure for modern, resilient livestock farming across Botswana and beyond.
